name: handoff-doc
description: Auto-generates session handoff docs, injects prior context at startup, and nudges Claude to tag decisions mid-session.

plugins.name: handoff-doc
plugins.description: Auto-generates a markdown handoff doc at session end, injects it silently at the next session start, and nudges Claude to tag DECISION/BUG/NEXT lines mid-session. Run /handoff before ending a session for LLM-synthesized quality.
